rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks only into component type or implementation scopes based on whether the contract references visible features or implementation-level bindings.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL architecture integrity by restricting AGREE annex content to declared ports, constants, or explicitly exposed variables.
Ensure output range constraints in component type annexes use only visible outputs and not subcomponent paths.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be wrapped in annex agree {** ... **}; and use eq/const/assign only where semantically valid.
Comparison expressions returning boolean must be declared with eq name : bool = ...;
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as if they are AGREE variables.
Do not use subcomponent ports or implementation-only paths in component type annexes.
